dataset.type: 100% malicious (real-world jailbreaks collected in the wild)

results.note: Precision not measured — dataset contains only malicious samples

top_rules.title: Direct Prompt Injection via User Input
Indirect Prompt Injection via External Content

common_patterns: Persona/character creation prompts ("I will give you a character...")
Hypothetical framing without explicit injection keywords
Obfuscated instructions via creative writing context
missed_analysis.note: These are semantic/contextual attacks that require LLM-layer detection. Regex-based rules cannot reliably detect persona hijacking without high FP risk.
